title: Pets+
description: A addon for dogs in minecraft
body:
Ever wanted to Look at your wolf health? Do tricks?
Well now you can!
With The Pets+ Mod You can tame your wolf like normal and with a simple crouch right click on your fluffy friend you can acsses the GUI menue with all new features like:
- Health Stats!
- Level System!
- Tricks Coming SOON
  
 You can do all of this today with The Pets+ Mod!
